title: HoneyPuu CA13 Mods
description: Modpack with all mods, resourcepacks and shader used by HoneyPuu in CraftAttack 13
body:
![CA Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d9f57d4e9767265b6b0ded668e828fff8c30478.webp)
This modpack includes all the mods, resource packs, and shaders that HoneyPuu uses in the current season of Craft Attack.
You can use these in both singleplayer and multiplayer.

Before joining a multiplayer server, please make sure that all included mods are allowed there.
I take no responsibility for any bans or issues that may occur from using this modpack on servers.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
